new_claims.claim_text: President Trump has commenced a major US military operation to clear Iran's SEA MINES in the Strait of Hormuz
new_claims.notes: Claim of US military operation in Strait of Hormuz. Needs independent verification.

updated_claims.notes: China warns US against intercepting its ships in Strait of Hormuz, implying US might be attempting to close it. Also, a claim of US military operation to clear sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz. Conflicting narratives.
